window_summary: This window tracks the recent bitcoin/bitcoin release stream across major and minor versions, including maintenance updates and new feature releases from v22.0 through v31.0.

chunks.title: Bitcoin Core 22.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: bitcoin/bitcoin
Release: Bitcoin Core 22.0
Tag: v22.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2021-09-14T11:32:48Z; created_at: 2021-09-08T18:25:52Z
Release notes:
Bitcoin Core version 22.0 is now available from:
https://bitcoincore.org/bin/bitcoin-core-22.0/
For the release notes please see the git repository:
https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/blob/master/doc/release-notes/release-notes-22.0.md
Do not use the links provided by GitHub, rather use the above download links, they are guaranteed to be generated deterministically and signed.
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the bitcoin/bitcoin release v22.0, Bitcoin Core version 22.0 is made available with deterministic and signed download links from bitcoincore.org.

questions.query_text: In the bitcoin/bitcoin releases, which release provides Bitcoin Core version 25.0 with deterministic and signed download links from bitcoincore.org?

answer_support.answer_text: In the bitcoin/bitcoin release v25.0, Bitcoin Core version 25.0 is made available with deterministic and signed download links from bitcoincore.org.

questions.query_text: Across the bitcoin/bitcoin releases, how does the release note for v28.0 differ from the release note for v28.1?

options.text: v28.0 announces Bitcoin Core 28.0, while v28.1 announces Bitcoin Core 28.1.
v28.0 includes a new consensus change, while v28.1 only fixes a minor bug.
v28.0 is a pre-release, while v28.1 is a stable release.
v28.0 provides download links from GitHub, while v28.1 provides links from bitcoincore.org.

questions.expected_answer: v28.0 announces Bitcoin Core 28.0, while v28.1 announces Bitcoin Core 28.1.

answer_support.answer_text: In the bitcoin/bitcoin release v28.0, Bitcoin Core version 28.0 is made available with deterministic and signed download links from bitcoincore.org.
In the bitcoin/bitcoin release v28.1, Bitcoin Core version 28.1 is made available with deterministic and signed download links from bitcoincore.org.

questions.query_text: In the bitcoin/bitcoin release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release that makes Bitcoin Core version 27.0 available, (2) a release that makes Bitcoin Core version 27.1 available, (3) a release that makes Bitcoin Core version 27.2 available.

answer_support.answer_text: In the bitcoin/bitcoin release v27.0, Bitcoin Core version 27.0 is made available with deterministic and signed download links from bitcoincore.org.
In the bitcoin/bitcoin release v27.1, Bitcoin Core version 27.1 is made available with deterministic and signed download links from bitcoincore.org.
In the bitcoin/bitcoin release v27.2, Bitcoin Core version 27.2 is made available with deterministic and signed download links from bitcoincore.org.
